name: CblTalnIdsMrLnSvcCatReplTermDtUpdate

text.value: WITH xfm_Businesslogic AS (SELECT @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate} AS TERM_DT_SK) UPDATE T SET T.TERM_DT_SK = xfm_Businesslogic.TERM_DT_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = xfm_Businesslogic.RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MR_LN_SVC_CAT_RPLC T CROSS JOIN xfm_Businesslogic WHERE T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK < xfm_Businesslogic.RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AND T.MR_LN_SVC_CAT_RPLC_SK NOT IN (0,1) AND T.TERM_DT_SK = '2199-12-31'
